subcodes.first_line: A Book sent down in truth. Verily, it beareth witness unto that which was sent down aforetime from God unto the Prophets and Messengers [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب نزل بالحق انه شهد بما نزل من قبل من لدی الله علی النبیین و المرسلین قد
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
